description_long: This is a vintage-style scooter with a streamlined body painted in a vibrant blue and accented with light gray panels. The scooter features a single, elongated red seat and a rear luggage rack, both of which add to its classic urban appeal. The front section includes a rounded headlight, chrome handlebars with rearview mirrors, and a prominent front fender. The wheels are thin with visible spokes, and the side panels cover much of the engine and mechanical components, giving the scooter a clean, enclosed look. The exhaust pipe runs along the lower side, and the rear fender is extended to partially cover the back wheel. Subtle branding and a license plate are visible on the side and rear, enhancing its realistic appearance.
description: A classic blue and gray scooter with a red seat, chrome handlebars, and thin spoked wheels, featuring a rear luggage rack and a rounded headlight.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the red seat, rear luggage rack, taillight, and the back wheel partially covered by the extended fender.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the scooter, the blue and gray color scheme, the red seat, and the detailed spoked wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded headlight, chrome handlebars with mirrors, and the front fender covering the wheel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the exhaust pipe, side panels, and the overall streamlined design.
attribute_handlebar_type: curved with upright grips and mirrors
attribute_deck_design: elongated, enclosed, smooth with integrated side panels and footrest
attribute_brand_logo: oval-shaped logo on the front side panel
